MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

Russell Goodrow, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, PHUOC TRAN.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SUNNY LAND PRODUCE, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Phuoc Tran sworn and examinded on his behalf through Cantonese Interpreter Dorothy Wong.
This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,000.00
Costs: $55.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $2,555.00
Judgment signed in open court.
